description: MANDATORY PREREQUISITE. Install at ~/.claude/skills/forge-4d/PRE-FLIGHT.md and reference it from the top of SKILL.md as a HARD PREREQUISITE. Ten gates that must be answered in the log, with numbers, before ANY result is believed. Derived from a classification of all 8 oversights that nearly destroyed the programme -- every one was the same error: an assumption never given a test. Includes GATE 0 (the unknown unknown) and the reference log voice.
